headline: Southwest to strengthen loyalty program, digital experience with fresh leadership
summary: Nandika Suri is charged with expanding loyalty membership and deepening engagement, while Sabrina Callahan will pursue a seamless, customer-centric digital experience.

headline: Will American Airlines (AAL) Report Negative Earnings Next Week? What You Should Know
summary: American Airlines (AAL) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: Airline CEOs urged by lawmaker to lower fares if fuel prices come down
summary: Airlines have raised airfare, fuel surcharges and baggage fees this year to help cover a surge in fuel costs since the Iran war started on Feb. 28.
